---
title: "Project Two"
subtitle: "Short one-line description of what this project is"
date: 2026-01-01
image: ../placeholder.svg
description: "A brief summary of the project, the problem it solves, and the tools or stack used. Replace with real content."
---

<!-- PLACEHOLDER: replace with a real project write-up. -->

## Overview

Describe the project here: the motivation, what it does, and your role in
building it.

## Tech stack

- Placeholder
- Placeholder
- Placeholder

## Links

- [Repo](https://github.com/RamanaBotta)
